name: Tangerine Hens
recipeInstructions:
1. OPTIONAL: Rinse hens and pat dry.
2. Mix wine, soy sauce, salt, honey, and orange juice together in a bowl.
3. Rub 1 tablespoon butter inside each hen.
4. Sprinkle the cavity with salt.
5. Mix onion, garlic, pecans, mushrooms, and tangerines together.
6. Stuff each hen with this mixture.
7. Heat the liquid mixture until it begins to boil. Turn off heat and let cool for 5 minutes.
8. Pour 2 tablespoons of the cooled mixture into each hen.
9. Preheat oven to 325 degrees Fahrenheit.
10. Bake hens for 45 minutes, basting every 10 minutes with the liquid mixture.
11. Test birds; if not done, cook until done.
Note: This recipe has been successfully used on chickens, Guinea hens, and quail as well.
